summary: Operator Codex dispatches are plain supervised instructions or durable pointers, not command-prefixed goals.

allowed_payloads.description: Pointer to a durable supervised Operator work card.
Short bounded live or human-in-the-loop instruction.
examples: Inspect the named live surface and report whether the requested state is visible.

forbidden_prompt_shapes.description: Operator does not route deterministic implementation or own branch strategy.

loop_recovery_guidance: Wait for a bounded Foreman supervised instruction or Operator work-card pointer.
